user_prompt: Bless the pteraxii sterylizor for recalibration
prayer:
Approach the pteraxii sterylizor with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to awaken for recalibration, chanting the Canticle of Alignment.
Anoint the sensor vanes with sacred unguents whilst intoning binary psalms of precision.
Initiate recalibration sequences as the pteraxii sterylizor hums in harmonious response.
Verify the pteraxii sterylizor's attunement through auspex diagnostics and laud the Machine God.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for autogun an emergency procedure
prayer:
Kneel before the autogun and invoke the wrathful Machine Spirit against malfunction.
Recite the Rite of Emergency Procedure to purge impurities from its sacred mechanisms.
Apply blessed lubricants to the feed belts whilst beseeching the Omnissiah's intervention.
Cycle the autogun's action in ritual repetition, honouring its emergent fury.
Conclude with auspex scans affirming the autogun's readiness for the Emperor's toil.

user_prompt: Ready the life sustainer for targeting
prayer:

Sanctify the flow regulators with incense of promethium, beseeching precision delivery.
Engage targeting matrices as the life sustainer pulses with Omnissiah-blessed vigour.
Test the life sustainer's aim through simulacra, praising the Machine God's grace.

Extend mechadendrites over the servo-arm, reciting the Purification Doxology.
Initiate sterilization by bathing its joints in ablative plasmas blessed by the Omnissiah.
Scour the servo-arm's manipulators with sacred abrasives, appeasing its labouring Spirit.
Invoke further cleansing waves upon the servo-arm, purging all xenos taint.
Conclude with auspex benediction, declaring the servo-arm immaculate for toil.

prayer:
Prostrate before the galvanic rifle, beseeching its galvanic Machine Spirit urgently.
Enact the emergency procedure rite with litanies of discharge and reload.
Anoint the induction coils whilst chanting binaric pleas to the Omnissiah for stability.
Cycle the galvanic rifle's mechanisms in frantic harmony, purging faults.
Affirm the galvanic rifle's readiness through test-volleys of sanctified lightning.

Commune with the Manticore's vast chassis, invoking its predatory Machine Spirit.
Begin initialization by igniting rune-engines with promethium prayers to the Omnissiah.
Align macro-cannons and auspex through sacred calibration, awakening its fury.
The Manticore roars to life; beseech its spirits for flawless initialization.
Seal with noospheric benedictions, readying the Manticore for apocalyptic wrath.
